title: Emergency Tender Launched for Wick - Aberdeen PSO Service

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Highland Council has initiated an emergency tender process to secure a new operator for the Wick - Aberdeen Public Service Obligation (PSO) service. This procurement was launched today in response to the urgent need for air connectivity in the region.

The Wick - Aberdeen route plays a significant role in connecting communities across the Highlands and Islands, areas where aviation has been vital since the inter-war period. Ensuring reliable air service is important for local residents and businesses alike.
